Project Blackpink
Project Blackpink

Built for how
talent decisions
actually happen.

An internal talent management and succession planning system, designed for DSTA HR Talent Managers and Leadership to make better, faster, more confident decisions.

Primary users
Talent Managers
Own the system day-to-day. Build succession plans, manage exposure opportunities, track talent development, and prepare materials for leadership meetings
Goal
Support effective talent development, succession planning, leadership pipeline management, and exposure activities management in one integrated system.
The transformation

Today vs
Tomorrow.

Fragmented excel sheets and documents
→
Unified talent view and live system
Inconsistent records
→
Consistent, disciplined, holistic talent management
Reactive, scrambling when requests come in
→
Proactive talent tracking and ready-state planning
Intuition and memory-based decisions
→
System-supported, data-informed decisions
The system

Six modules.
One system.

01
Dashboard
Pipeline alerts, bench strength, upcoming milestones
02
Talent Directory
Full profiles, development plans, notes
03
Talent Programmes
Enrolments and programme progress
04
Exposure Opportunities
Roles, taskforces, AI-matched talent pools
05 — Today's focus
Succession Planning
Live plans, recommended successors, one-click reports
06
Route of Advancement
ROA pacing and development trajectory
Succession Planning

The live
succession plan.

Each plan shows the incumbent and ranked successors across two time horizons: Possible Next Successors (0–4 years) and Possible Future Successors (5–10 years). Plans are organised by Programme Centre, with an “Others” section for MINDEF and non-DSTA roles.

View mode
Browse any plan cleanly. All details visible, nothing editable by accident
Edit mode
Click Edit to unlock: add, remove, reorder. Click Save to lock the plan again
Click a feature to preview
×
Succession Planning

The system already
knows who.

Click Add Successor and recommended candidates surface at the top. No hunting through spreadsheets. The logic is systematic and transparent:

0–4 year band
Candidates exactly one appointment level below the incumbent
5–10 year band
Candidates two or three levels below the incumbent
Sort order
Highest LP, then highest SG, then oldest age. Applied automatically
Bulk add
Select multiple candidates at once, add in one click, then reorder
×
Succession Planning

Real questions,
fast answers,
built for the live meeting.

“Eh, how about moving this person from this plan to the other? Can I see which plans they’re already in?”

— A real question from CE, in a live meeting
Drag & drop
Reorder successors instantly, live, with CE watching
“Moved” label
Repositioned cards show a Moved indicator automatically
Show other plans
One toggle. See every plan this person is in, instantly
Click a feature to preview
Click a feature to preview

Succession Planning

The report that
writes itself.

Before
  • Manual compilation from multiple spreadsheets
  • Hours of formatting and cross-referencing
  • Risk of errors and outdated data
With TalentOS
  • One click generates the full SAP-ready report
  • Data pulled live from the succession plan
  • Consistent format, every time
Succession Planning

A few more
things.

Change log
Every edit to a succession plan is timestamped and attributed. Full audit trail, always
PC switcher
Jump between HQ, CAPVISTA, CYBER and every other PC without leaving the page
Ahead of ROA
Talent flagged as ahead of their Route of Advancement is surfaced automatically on their profile
